name: before-ai
description: Before you reach for AI — a Socratic walkthrough that interrogates one real workflow from first principles, deletes the inherited/political/bureaucratic dead weight, then runs the survivors through the four-question test (Volume · Pattern · Stakes · Verification) to decide whether AI is even warranted. It asks; it never advises. You decide and self-rate; you walk away with a redesigned workflow and a decision report.
